executiveSummary: Hamilton Roofing has positioned itself as Redding, Chico, and Red Bluff's No. 1 roofing contractor, and your website at hamiltonroofing.org backs that up with a modern tech stack. You're running on Astro with Vercel hosting -- a cutting-edge framework that delivers fast page loads and clean code. You've got dedicated service pages for roof installation, repair, replacement, inspection, leak detection, metal roofing, shingle roofing, and commercial services. Plus, you have a dedicated Chico service area page and customer reviews mentioning Dan by name.

But here's the gap: your site is behind a Vercel security checkpoint that blocks automated crawlers, which means SEO tools and potentially Googlebot may have trouble indexing your pages. You have minimal schema markup detected, limited evidence of keyword-optimized meta descriptions, no blog or content marketing strategy, and no FAQ or structured Q&A content. Your service pages appear functional but lack the in-depth, keyword-rich content needed to rank for competitive roofing terms.

With 60+ years of combined experience and GAF certification, Hamilton Roofing has the credibility. The digital strategy just needs to catch up -- and on a modern Astro/Vercel platform, the technical ceiling is high.

assessment.title: Website Analysis -- hamiltonroofing.org
points: Built on Astro framework with Vercel hosting -- modern, fast, and performant.
Dedicated service pages for 8+ roofing services including installation, repair, inspection, and commercial.
Chico service area page established at hamiltonroofing.org/service-areas/chico-ca.
Customer reviews section with named testimonials praising Dan and the team.
GAF certified roofing contractor -- strong trust signal.
Serves Redding, Red Bluff, Chico, Paradise, Mt. Shasta, and Burney.
Clean URL structure and modern site architecture.

assessment.title: SEO & Content Gaps
points: Vercel security checkpoint may block automated crawlers including SEO tools and potentially Googlebot.
Minimal schema markup detected -- missing LocalBusiness, FAQPage, and Review structured data.
Limited evidence of keyword-optimized meta descriptions across pages.
No blog or content marketing strategy -- zero organic traffic from informational searches.
Service pages appear functional but lack in-depth keyword-rich content for competitive rankings.
No FAQ schema or structured Q&A content despite common roofing questions.
Limited location pages -- only Chico has a dedicated page; Redding, Paradise, Mt. Shasta missing.
Google Business Profile optimization status unclear.

assessment.title: Competitive Landscape
points: Tugwell Roofing has two physical locations with dual phone numbers and proper WordPress SEO infrastructure.
Boster Roofing has more detailed RoofingContractor schema markup.
Your Astro/Vercel platform gives you a speed advantage -- but only if the SEO layer is built out.
60+ years of experience and GAF certification are powerful differentiators that need to be reflected in structured data and content.

findings.finding: Vercel security checkpoint may block Googlebot and SEO crawlers
Minimal structured data -- missing LocalBusiness, Review, FAQ schemas
Limited keyword-optimized meta descriptions across pages
No blog or content marketing -- zero informational traffic
Service pages functional but lack detailed keyword-rich content
Only Chico has dedicated page -- Redding, Paradise, Mt. Shasta missing
No FAQ schema or structured Q&A content
Modern Astro/Vercel stack -- fast performance and clean architecture
8+ dedicated service pages covering major roofing categories

strategy.title: Phase 1: Fix Crawler Access & SEO Foundation (Months 1-2)
actions: Resolve Vercel security checkpoint to ensure Googlebot and SEO tools can crawl all pages.
Implement LocalBusiness and RoofingContractor schema markup across the site.
Write keyword-optimized meta descriptions for every page.
Expand service page content from brief descriptions to 500-700 word detailed pages.
Add Review schema for customer testimonials to enable star ratings in search results.
Implement FAQ schema for common roofing questions.
Set up Google Search Console and verify indexing status.

strategy.title: Phase 2: Content & Local SEO Expansion (Months 3-5)
actions: Launch blog with monthly roofing content: maintenance guides, material comparisons, storm prep.
Create dedicated location pages for Redding, Paradise, Red Bluff, Mt. Shasta, and Burney.
Optimize Google Business Profile with photos, posts, and review management.
Build citation consistency across directories (BBB, Yelp, Angi, HomeAdvisor).
Implement image SEO with descriptive alt text across all pages.

strategy.title: Phase 3: Market Dominance & Paid Growth (Months 6-12)
actions: Google Ads targeting high-intent roofing keywords across all service areas.
Before/after project galleries with proper image SEO.
Video content highlighting 60+ years of expertise and GAF certification.
Monthly competitive analysis and ranking reports.
Email marketing for seasonal promotions and maintenance reminders.

pricingIntro: Hamilton Roofing has a modern tech stack, strong service coverage, and real customer trust. The goal is to layer on the SEO and content strategy that turns your fast, clean website into the top-ranking roofing site across Redding, Chico, and Red Bluff.
about: Ridge Cell Repair LLC is a California-based digital marketing and business analysis firm specializing in helping service-industry businesses grow their online presence and generate more leads. We focus on practical, results-driven strategies rather than flashy marketing that doesn't convert.
Our approach is data-first: we research your market, identify what your competitors are doing (and not doing), and build a strategy that delivers real business outcomes.
What sets us apart is that we treat every client like a partner, not an account number. You get direct access to the people doing the work -- no layers of account managers.
nextSteps: You've got the fastest site in the local roofing market with Astro/Vercel, 60+ years of experience, and GAF certification. The missing piece is making sure Google can actually see and rank all of it. A proper SEO layer on top of your existing platform would be a game-changer.
